intro.title: An advisor, not a middleman
intro.body: I am Eng. Javad Asadi, a specialized real estate advisor in Sari and Mazandaran. My work is not merely posting listings — it is identifying genuine opportunities, precise property analysis, professional negotiation, and managing the deal to the final moment. With deep market knowledge and access to off-market opportunities, I introduce the value of your asset to the right market professionally and confidentially.
